title: Feature request: Support Duplicate Item into a Different Board directly
excerpt:
We need an option to duplicate an item to a different board directly.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need an option to duplicate an item to a different board directly.

The reason is simple. If the item contains subitems or updates, it’s way more complex & sometimes impossible to use the “create item” api and create a replica of that item.

Currently, it’s only possible to duplicate an item within the same board - but that creates a lot chaos because users might have a board-level automation like “when item is created…” which can trigger unnecessarily.

The solution is simple - simply allow API users to specify in which board the item should be duplicated. This is method currently working already - it’s just not official, and breaks sometimes.

If you’ve faced this issue or would benefit from this feature,
please give it a or leave a comment so monday can see how many of us need this!

posts.author: Atul (Atul | cloudvandana apps)
posts.cookedHtml: How would you take care of different columns in different boards?
